title: Mekanism Tools
description: Powerful tools and armor for Mekanism.
body: Mekanism Tools is an official addon to Mekanism that adds Tools and Armor for various Mekanism materials, and some vanilla ones. Features Armor, Shields, and Tools (including Paxels, an axe, pickaxe, shovel multitool) for the following: - Bronze - Lapis Lazuli - Osmium - Refined Glowstone - Refined Obsidian - Steel Additionally contains Paxels for the Vanilla tool types: - Wood - Stone - Iron - Gold - Diamond Links to other Mekanism modules: - [Mekanism](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism) - [Mekanism Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism-additions) - [Mekanism Generators](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism-generators)
